title: Ruff Lint/Format Policy
purpose: Require Ruff lint/format checks for Python code generated or modified by MetaBlooms governance workflows.

rules.when: Python files under 0_kernel/scripts, engines, validators, or mutation tooling are created or modified
must: run 0_kernel/vendor/bin/ruff check on changed Python files
run 0_kernel/vendor/bin/ruff format when safe or report why formatting was skipped
record Ruff bootstrap/check results in receipts for governed changes

rules.when: Ruff is missing and pip/network are available
